demoDisclaimer: Illustrative numbers and plugin readiness are mock-only. Production ROI and eligibility require certified pipelines and signed partner agreements.

pipelineEvents.message: Batch accepted: 1,240 lane + pick/ban rows (MOBA sandbox normalization)
Mapped 98% of required fields; 2 ward/smoke consent fields flagged for policy review
Partial: player portrait consent missing for 14 pros — widgets stay amber until resolved
Partner queue paused: shard API credential not rotated (demo block)

readinessSummary.headline: You can ship sandbox widgets today. Live monetization plugins need consent + GPM stream fixes.

plugins.name: NeoCast lower-third pack
missingForGreen: Portrait pack OR generic silhouettes policy

roiNarrative.title: Estimated partner uplift (demo)
roiNarrative.body: Ranges sum illustrative enabled plugins only (green + optional amber where you accept policy overlays). Third-party tools with red readiness are excluded until blockers clear.
roiNarrative.methodology: Mock formula: base audience × engagement factor × CPM bands supplied by partner marketing templates — not financial advice.
